results.title: And I would run 500 times ... Jersey Parkrun proclaims major milestone this Saturday
results.description: JERSEY’S Parkrun – a weekly free 5k run at Les Quennevais – hits 500 on Saturday, with organisers hoping that at least 500 people will take part to mark the milestone. Starting 11 years ago, the volunteer-run event began with around 75 people but now attracts hundreds of runners every week – from the speedsters [...] The post And I would run 500 times ... Jersey Parkrun proclaims major milestone this Saturday appeared first on Jersey Evening Post .

results.title: England Hockey to move GB home Pro League matches abroad in 2027
results.description: England Hockey aiming for more eyeballs on Channel 4 digital platforms ahead of EuroHockey 2027 hosting Great Britain men and women will play all their Pro League matches for the 2026/27 season away from home. This is a result of England Hockey hosting the 2027 EuroHockey Championships and the logistics involved, as well as the [...] The post England Hockey to move GB home Pro League matches abroad in 2027 appeared first on The Hockey Paper .

results.title: Report: Maple Leafs to interview Jay Woodcroft for head coach
results.description: A name has finally emerged in the Toronto Maple Leafs’ coaching search. Former Edmonton Oilers head coach Jay Woodcroft will interview with the Maple Leafs this week, NHL insider Frank Seravalli reported on Wednesday. Woodcroft, 49, also interviewed with the Los Angeles Kings last week and is “one of the front runners” for the Maple Leafs [...] The post Report: Maple Leafs to interview Jay Woodcroft for head coach appeared first on CityNews Edmonton .
